code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const cartItemService={getItemsByCartId:async cartId=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/api/cart-items/cart/".concat(cartId)),()=>api.get("/api/cart-items?cartId=".concat(cartId)),()=>api.get("/cart-items/cart/".concat(cartId))])).data,addCartItem:async item=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/api/cart-items',item),()=>api.post('/cart-items',item)])).data,updateCartItem:async(id,item)=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.put("/api/cart-items/".concat(id),item),()=>api.put("/cart-items/".concat(id),item)])).data,removeCartItem:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.delete("/api/cart-items/".concat(id)),()=>api.delete("/cart-items/".concat(id))])).data};
